generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and duty, you know how important it is to have strong domestic security measures. Recent events have shown that our current laws are outdated and can't keep up with modern threats. Expanding security powers isn't about restricting freedoms - it's about protecting them. Look at how other countries handle this; they've struck the right balance between safety and civil liberties. We can too, if we give our agencies the tools they need. It's our responsibility to ensure public safety, and that means supporting reasonable expansions of domestic security powers. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
